BackstoryDef.title: commander
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] valiantly served [PAWN_possessive] nation in countless battles and slowly rose through the ranks of the military of a city state. In time, [PAWN_pronoun] was promoted to the rank of commander and given [PAWN_possessive] own unit to lead.\n\n[PAWN_possessive] new elite position brought about the expected increase in status, wealth, and influence. [PAWN_nameDef] eventually grew spoiled and entitled.

BackstoryDef.title: juggernaut
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] valiantly served [PAWN_possessive] nation in countless battles and slowly rose through the ranks of the military of a city state. In time, [PAWN_pronoun] was promoted to the rank of commander and given [PAWN_possessive] own unit to lead.\n\n[PAWN_possessive] new elite position brought about the expected increase in status, wealth, and influence. [PAWN_nameDef] eventually grew spoiled and entitled.
